default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Since I've followed you here, my services are yours to command. Brandy offers a smooth finish, tequila a searing fire... whatever sensation you seek, you shall find it at my lounge.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: The weak have no claim to vengeance... I refuse to fail again.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I witnessed my family's glory, and with them, I fell into the abyss. But not anymore. I won't stand and watch as everything crumbles again. It may take time, I may stumble along the way. But I swear, I'll find the man who trampled my family's honor... and drag him to hell with my own hands.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: The haze has lifted. Time to get to work.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Next time, I hope it's those people lying at my feet.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Not the first time I've failed... Once the pain passes, I'll stand again.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: A life for a life!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Again... all for nothing. Heh... perhaps it's for the best.

default.title: Greeting
default.text: It's been too quiet in here. For a moment, I thought you'd never come... Please, have a seat. Let me fix you a drink.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: It doesn't matter what lies beneath a polished façade. Once the liquor takes hold, everything is laid bare. Alcohol can be a remarkable instrument, at times.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: These hands once played melodies that won my family honor and praise... Now all that remains are ugly scars and cold metal.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: ...The scars on my face? They're... nothing worth speaking of. It's hardly an exciting story, and certainly not one worth your time.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: There's no great secret to bartending. If you want a drink to taste a certain way, you simply add the right ingredients. People are no different. Give them something sweet enough, and they'll become whoever you wish them to be.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: This brooch... is the only memento I have left of my family. It's worthless to anyone else, but to me... it's worth more than any fortune. After all, it's the only thing that's still truly mine.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: ...I just had a dream. I was a boy again, in our family garden. I fell and scraped my knee. My mother rushed over to help, reaching out her hand. But when I reached out to take it, the dream ended. All I could touch was a cold glass bottle.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: For the longest time, I believed myself to be a scapegoat chosen by fate, destined for sacrifice, left behind like some crude, pathetic joke... But then, it seemed fate let a single drop of redemption slip through its fingers. It let me find you. You who led me out of the abyss, and showed me how to go on.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Every day, I polish these glasses until they're spotless... just like how I once tried so hard to polish my life to perfection. Laughable, isn't it?

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: These gestures... are quite unnecessary. If you have a clear intention, I would prefer you state it plainly.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: I'm accustomed to being looked at. With scorn, greed, or amusement... But your eyes hold none of that. When you look at me, I'm not an item on display, but an equal person.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: It's fine. I've done this kind of work before.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: They seem to think all I can do is mix drinks. Quite the underestimation, wouldn't you say?

default.title: Upgrade
default.text: I do need strength. Thank you.
